query:
You are a venture-capital analyst. For each of the 10 companies below, build an identity + financial profile from Crunchbase, Pitchbook, Dealroom, TechCrunch, Les Echos, official press releases, and LinkedIn About sections.

Companies:
  1. name="Coval", website="https://coval.ai"
  2. name="SiliconFlow", website="https://siliconflow.com"
  3. name="Together AI", website="https://together.ai"
  4. name="Workato", website="https://orkato.com"
  5. name="Northflank", website="https://northflank.com"
  6. name="Botpress", website="https://botpress.com"
  7. name="Hugging Face", website="https://huggingface.co"
  8. name="Altair AI Studio", website="https://altair.com"
  9. name="Fermyon", website="https://fermyon.com"
  10. name="AWS Bedrock", website="https://aws.amazon.com"

For EACH company extract:
- name (EXACTLY as listed above), website, hq_city, hq_country, founded_year
- employee_count (current LinkedIn headcount as integer)
- employee_growth_yoy (year-over-year change as decimal: +12% → 0.12)
- funding_stage (Seed / Series A / B / C / Public / Bootstrapped)
- funding_status: 'Funded' if any disclosed round; 'Bootstrapped' if founders publicly state self-funded / no VC / never raised; 'Stealth' if company explicitly operating in stealth mode; 'Unknown' otherwise.
- funding_total_usd (cumulative raised in USD)
- last_round_amount_usd, last_round_date (YYYY-MM-DD), last_round_type
- funding_rounds: COMPLETE history — array of {round, amount_usd, date, lead} ordered chronologically. Aim for 2-5 rounds when available.
- notable_investors: distinct VCs/angels/corporates across all rounds. For each: {name, domain}. The domain is the investor's website (e.g. 'sequoiacap.com' for Sequoia Capital) — critical for logo display.
- arr_usd: ONLY if publicly disclosed (funding press, podcast). Do NOT estimate.
- customer_count: ONLY if officially announced.
- avg_contract_usd: ONLY if disclosed.
- acquisition: {acquired, acquirer, amount_eur, year, source_url}. Return acquired=false if not acquired.

Omit any field you cannot verify — do NOT pad with placeholders or guess. Return one object per company in the SAME order as the input list.

---

## Notes & Source Attribution

### 1. Coval
- HQ, funding stage, seed amount: [2] and [4]. Seed led by MaC Ventures with General Catalyst, Y Combinator, Fortitude Ventures, Pioneer Fund, Lombard Street Ventures participating.
- Total funding $3.8M over 2 rounds per Tracxn. The $3.3M Seed + ~$500K pre-seed/YC standard deal reconciles to ~$3.8M.
- YC S24 batch per Brooke Hopkins LinkedIn, implying founding year ~2024.
- ARR ~$550K per Getlatka.
- Employee count: Pitchbook reports 5 total employees; LinkedIn slug `covaldev` shows ~11 range. Used approximate midpoint for the 1-50 LinkedIn bucket.

### 2. SiliconFlow
- Founded August 2023 by Yuan Jinhui and Pan Yang per CheckThat.ai. Legally registered in Singapore with operational presence in Beijing, China and Italy.
- Crunchbase lists HQ as Singapore, Central Region, Singapore; 51-100 employees ([6]).
- Series A closed June 9, 2025, led by Alibaba Cloud with Sinovation Ventures follow-on (KR-ASIA, [98]). Total funding $34.6M per Pitchbook.
- Exact round amounts for Seed/Angel and Series A not individually disclosed; nine-figure RMB reported for Series A.

### 3. Together AI
- Founded June 2022 in Menlo Park, CA per businessmodelcanvastemplate; HQ now San Francisco per [84].
- Employee count: 201-500 on LinkedIn, 368 on LinkedIn page, 350 per Forbes, 371 per Tracxn. Used 368 from LinkedIn.
- Funding rounds per [110]: Seed $20M (May 16, 2023), Series A $102M (Nov 29, 2023), Series B $106M (Mar 14, 2024), Series B $305M (Feb 20, 2025). Series A also reported as $102.5M per [107].
- Series B $305M led by General Catalyst and co-led by Prosperity7 per [18].
- Sacra estimates ~$1B ARR as of Feb 2026 per Sacra PDF; not included as not officially disclosed.

### 4. Workato
- Founded 2013 per LinkedIn and [70]. Mountain View, CA.
- Employee count: 1,351 as of Mar 31, 2026 per Tracxn. LinkedIn shows 1,001-5,000 range. Revelio reports 1,560.
- Funding total: $421M over 5 rounds per [69]; $415M per [143].
- Series B $25M (Dec 2018) per [44] led by Battery Ventures.
- Series D $110M at $1.7B valuation (Jan 2021) led by Altimeter Capital per BusinessWire.
- Series E $200M at $5.7B valuation (Nov 2021) per [145].
- 7,000+ customers per Jan 2021 press release. ARR ~$150M per Getlatka.

### 5. Northflank
- Founded 2019, London, UK per [68]. LinkedIn: 11-50 employees; [66] reports 19.
- Total funding $24.9M in 2 rounds per Tracxn. Series A stage.
- $22M combined Seed + Series A announced Nov 11, 2024, led by Bain Capital Ventures per [52]. Other investors: Kindred Ventures, Tapestry VC, Pebblebed, Uncorrelated Ventures, Vertex Ventures US.
- Seed ~$2.9M implied from $24.9M total minus $22M Series A tranche.

### 6. Botpress
- Founded 2017, Quebec, Canada per [129] and [61]. Crunchbase: 51-100 employees.
- Series A: $15M (US) / CA$20M, April 2021, led by Decibel Partners with Inovia Capital per [63] and [128].
- Series B: $25M, led by Framework Venture Partners with Deloitte Ventures per Yahoo Finance and LinkedIn post.
- Total: $40M over 2 rounds per [23].

### 7. Hugging Face
- Founded 2016, Manhattan, New York City per [51].
- Employee count: 679 as of Dec 2025 per Revelio; ~635 per [117]. 444 in 2024 per Getlatka, yielding YoY growth ~0.53.
- Total funding: $398.92M over 11 rounds per CB Insights.
- Series D: $235M (Aug 22, 2023) led by Salesforce Ventures per [90]. Investors include Google, Nvidia, Amazon, Intel, IBM, AMD, Qualcomm, Sound Ventures.
- Series C (Apr 26, 2022): Sequoia Capital, Coatue, Addition, SV Angel per Tracxn.
- Series B (Mar 11, 2021): Lee Fixel, A.Capital Ventures, Lux Capital, Betaworks per Tracxn.
- Series A (Dec 17, 2019): Lux Capital, Richard Socher per Tracxn.
- ARR ~$130.1M per [117]; 50K customers per same source.

### 8. Altair AI Studio
- Altair AI Studio is a product (formerly RapidMiner Studio) of Altair Engineering, which was NASDAQ: ALTR, headquartered in Troy, Michigan, founded 1985 per [137] and Wikipedia.
- Altair acquired RapidMiner in Sep 2022 (~$100M per Orrick).
- Altair itself acquired by Siemens in 2025 for $10.6 billion ($113/share) per Wikipedia and [94].
- 3,000+ employees per salestools.io. As a public/subsidiary entity, exact funding rounds are not applicable in the VC sense. Amount in EUR: approximately 10B EUR (USD 10.6B converted).

### 9. Fermyon
- Founded 2021, Modesto, California per [82]. Also described as Seattle-area.
- Total funding: $26M over 2 rounds per Tracxn. Series A $20M (Oct 24, 2022) led by Insight Partners with Amplify Partners, Marc Campbell, Tyler McMullen, Grant Miller, Armon Dadgar per Tracxn. Seed (Jun 21, 2022) led by Amplify Partners with angel investors. Seed amount ~$6M implied from $26M - $20M.
- Acquired by Akamai Technologies, announced Dec 1, 2025 per [79]. Terms not disclosed.
- [14] confirmed acquisition; Akamai 2025 annual report references Nov 2025 acquisition timing.

### 10. AWS Bedrock
- AWS Bedrock is a cloud computing service of Amazon Web Services, not a standalone company. Launched 2023 per [39]. It provides a unified API for foundation models.
- As a product/service within Amazon (NASDAQ: AMZN, HQ Seattle, WA), it does not have independent funding rounds, employee counts, or investor lists. The "funding_stage" is marked Public since it belongs to a public company. Founded_year reflects the service launch year (2023).
